The widget doesn’t match what you see when you click on it and I loved that feature because I used to favorite from there. I wish I could say I would be subscribing again someday, but because I basically lost everything I built in the past three years of subscribing, just because I can’t afford it is very disheartening. It walked me out of low self esteem and boosted my confidence.', 'author': 'Flooreeeeennn', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-15', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'The Alarm - how do I stop it?????', 'content': 'I tried all the things listed under the “Help” category to turn off the alarm, but nothing works.', 'author': 'AvenRomaine', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-15', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': '2026-10-09T22:00:00.000Z', 'content': 'amazing app. very motivational and helpful! 10/10 recommend to anybody struggling with any sort of mental health!', 'author': 'haiitsleah420', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-15', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Expensive', 'content': 'I did the three day free trial, and couldn’t figure out exactly what features were paid and what were free, which was frustrating. So I canceled. I was then offered a $17.99 deal, but still before I was able to actually see what the “free” version was. After I was able to see that it’s very basic without the premium, I decided to go ahead with the $17.99 promo- only to discover I was actually charged $69.99. It’s a pretty expensive bait and switch. I can justify $18 for it, but $70 is a lot for any app, let alone this one. I was really hoping this one would turn out good so I can recommend to clients, but turns out it’s deceptive.', 'author': 'Fun sofar', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-14', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Awesome App and Great Developers!', 'content': 'The app had a glitch and the developers were spot on to fix it. And they even showed me how they updated the feature in a very classy way. 

There’s a few little hidden features in the app. So if you think something isn’t working. You might be surprised to find out it actually works very easily. Just in a classy way you did not think of. 

Simply email the app developers and they will be more than happy to explain to you how numerous things work if you find you want to do something and feel like it doesn’t work. Or if you have an idea. You might be surprised to discover that your idea is something the app actually already does just in a hidden way. 

Very useful wonderful app. 

Great development team.', 'author': 'Pretty Deaf Princess', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-14', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Excellent & Encouraging app!', 'content': 'Sends me the perfect daily messages at the perfect times ✨🙏🏾', 'author': 'OmarEwen', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-14', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Language unacceptable', 'content': 'I hate that curse words are often included in my affirmations that I receive and I cannot block it. It makes me not open the app because this is not how I speak to myself. I don’t know why this changed. This app should be better.', 'author': 'badst11', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-13', 'rating': 2, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Misleading Offer and Cost', 'content': 'Like others, I downloaded this app with the idea of trying it out before deciding if it was worth my time. Upon opening for the first time, there was about 10 minutes worth of questions I had to answer. As a customer who is curious about the product, getting barraged with personal questions before I can see what this product even is is already a big negative. Like most other companies on the internet, I assume they’re mining my data almost immediately (which is NOT a good feeling). 
Then my biggest problem is the subscription situation. After all those questions I get hit that it’s $70 for the year. There was no explanation on what that entailed (and again I hadn’t even made it to the interface of the actual app yet) and no other subscription options (which turns out there are?!?). They’re lucky I was still curious so I continued, thinking I will annoyingly have to make more time in my schedule just to cancel the subscription, again having to promise my time to something I don’t even know about. Inside the app, I find it mostly interesting and functional. The buttons on the Home Screen are a little confusing on what takes you where. 
Then I go to the subscription section to see what’s going on, thinking I’m going to cancel because $70 is too much. Doing that through Apple brought me to a page with the other options… finally. There are 4 options, none of which have any real explanation of what they are or do other than how much you’re charged per month/year. I notice a $35/year option….what does that entail? Why was that not presented to me in the beginning? How is that different $70? I literally have no way of knowing what that option actually comes with. 
Ultimately the interface is beautiful, the idea is great and truly almost there. But the elusiveness and lack of transparency around billing and subscriptions leaves a very bad taste. On to find a similar app without all the upfront hassle.', 'author': 'Msdetective', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-13', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Simply Powerful', 'content': 'Using “I am - Daily Affirmations” is a simply powerful way to orient to a healthy mindset and individual wellbeing. I love the affirmations provided by the app and being able to write my own. Always a great part of my day!', 'author': 'Shan M. C.', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-13', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Annoying', 'content': "Will not delete off my phone even though I've removed the app. Asks 19099 questions and then goes off too much.", 'author': 'Mottbear', 'version': '6.36.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-13', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'The Best', 'content': 'One of my favorite apps for self-love and compassion. \U0001fa77 I recommend!', 'author': 'Granberri', 'version': '6.35.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-12', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'A', 'content': 'Ur', 'author': 'nicolestarr13', 'version': '6.35.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-12', 'rating': 4, 'country': 'GB', 'title': 'Fast bug fix', 'content': 'Lovely app to check daily and I must give them props for the fast bug fix and great customer service.', 'author': 'squeezyS', 'version': '6.35.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-12', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Inspirational', 'content': 'This app has been so inspirational reviving and uplifting to me. These daily affirmations has given me hope to press forward in persevere.', 'author': 'Royalty 12', 'version': '6.35.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-12', 'rating': 4, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Tons of updates & improvements, and Developers are on top of improving glitches fast!', 'content': 'Currently there’s a Wealth of improvements going on in this app making it fun and enjoyable for numerous age ranges and numerous people’s needs. The app has beautiful graphic images and much more readability in the text on the images for those who have lower vision. There’s numerous ways to customize this app to fit your needs which I truly enjoy. I write my own affirmations and do my own customized image design in the app. The app now includes an AI affirmations writer for those who have things they want to work on AI will customize 10-16 affirmations per day if needed for you. It’s actually a very fun and useful tool. 


Unfortunately the last 2 updates have a little glitch that the developers are working on right now. With all the beautiful new features they have added. And a wonderful new event experience for mental health month…the ability to edit your own affirmations or the words of pre-written affirmations has disappeared from the app. Also the ability to edit your own categories has disappeared. 

But the app developers are aware of this little glitch which actually had numerous other hiccups 3 weeks ago. The developers are indeed on it. They really do care about the apps they create for us to use. They have been in very close contact with me, and they have been fixing all the little hiccups. 

Trust me when I say that what seems like a tiny annoyance to us is actually a huge problem for app developers. They have to go through numerous changes and make sure that the app not only functions and does what they want it to do and it doesn’t do something that they don’t want. But then they have to ensure that it’s coding and protocols meet all the rules of every single platform and operating system that can use the app. It’s really a lot of work for the app developers. And for them to be this on top of it. 

Definitely deserves a ton of credit. 4 out of 5 stars only because there’s the little glitch that the developers are working on as I’m typing. 

Will definitely be a 5-7stars which they don’t allow more than 5 stars but they should. For this app. Because they should allow the 2 stars for customer support so like other things 5 stars if everything is good 6 stars if customer service included with professionalism. 7 stars if treated with respect and made to feel important and valued. But you know only penthouses and restaurants get this star rating. Not apps. But when the apps catch up to the ratings they deserve this would be one of those 7 stars. Because they have a great development team. 

Princess', 'author': 'Pretty Deaf Princess', 'version': '6.35.0'}, {'date': '2026-05-12', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'The Struggle', 'content': 'You can’t be positive for an app that refuses to want to assist in bettering “you”!!
